raw.message: Upgrade your robots and crush the competition!

hook.summary: Giant mech firing lasers in a city street.
hook.visual_action: Third-person perspective of a heavily armed mech shooting at a target with green and blue lasers in a futuristic city.

scene_flow: Mech engages an enemy target in a futuristic city street.
Announcer shouts 'KILL' as the enemy is destroyed with laser fire.
Mech fires at multiple enemies, achieving a 'DOUBLE KILL' with high-intensity visual effects.
Cinematic transition through a digital tunnel to the game logo.
End card displays 'WAR ROBOTS' and 'START NOW!' over a hexagonal background.
audience_proxy: Male gamers aged 18-35 who enjoy competitive multiplayer action and sci-fi combat.
